subject: Welcome to Helio Retail
body_paragraphs: I hope this message finds you well. We are excited to welcome you to Helio Retail and look forward to supporting you as you begin your journey with us.

To ensure a smooth onboarding process, we have outlined key steps and resources that will help you get started. Our team is here to assist you every step of the way, so please do not hesitate to reach out with any questions or for further clarification on any aspect of the onboarding process.
